description.en: Add a new subscriber to a Mailcoach email list. Supports tags, extra attributes, and double opt-in skip.
description.de: Einen neuen Abonnenten zu einer Mailcoach-E-Mail-Liste hinzufügen. Unterstützt Tags, zusätzliche Attribute und Double-Opt-In-Überspringen.
description.es: Add a new subscriber to a Mailcoach email list. Supports tags, extra attributes, and double opt-in skip.
description.fr: Add a new subscriber to a Mailcoach email list. Supports tags, extra attributes, and double opt-in skip.
description.ro: Add a new subscriber to a Mailcoach email list. Supports tags, extra attributes, and double opt-in skip.
description.it: Add a new subscriber to a Mailcoach email list. Supports tags, extra attributes, and double opt-in skip.

description.en: The UUID of the email list to subscribe to.
description.es: The UUID of the email list to subscribe to.
description.fr: The UUID of the email list to subscribe to.
description.ro: The UUID of the email list to subscribe to.
description.it: The UUID of the email list to subscribe to.

description.en: The email address of the subscriber.
description.es: The email address of the subscriber.
description.fr: The email address of the subscriber.
description.ro: The email address of the subscriber.
description.it: The email address of the subscriber.

description.en: Comma-separated list of tags to assign to the subscriber.
description.es: Comma-separated list of tags to assign to the subscriber.
description.fr: Comma-separated list of tags to assign to the subscriber.
description.ro: Comma-separated list of tags to assign to the subscriber.
description.it: Comma-separated list of tags to assign to the subscriber.

description.en: Skip the double opt-in confirmation email and immediately subscribe.
